hero.pitch: I love creating web and mobile apps that are both efficient and user-friendly. With experience in modern tools like React, TypeScript, and Java, I enjoy solving problems and building solutions that make things run smoothly.

about.heading: A bit about me
about.body: I'm a full-stack developer currently building mobile and web products at Easset Company Limited, with a Bachelor's in Computer Science from Kasetsart University. I enjoy working across the whole stack — from React and React Native on the frontend to Java and Node.js on the backend.
